message:
refactor(node): move cli module from lib.rs to binary crate

The cli module contains binary-specific argument parsing (Clap structs)
that is only needed by the main.rs binary, not by library consumers.
Moving it from lib.rs to a `mod cli` declaration in main.rs:

- lib.rs: remove `pub mod cli` export
- main.rs: add `mod cli` declaration, import cli types via `crate::cli`
  instead of `frankenengine_node::cli`

This shrinks the public API surface of the library crate and keeps
binary-only concerns out of the library namespace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
